channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump cuts Pennsylvania town hall short over medical emergencies in crowd
item.description: Former President Donald Trump stopped questions at a town hall event after two medical emergencies took place in the Pennsylvania crowd.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris holds big advantage among early voters, Trump with Election Day voters: poll
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris holds a commanding lead over former President Trump in support from early voters, according to a new NBC News poll released Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Walz to unveil Harris' plan for rural voters as campaign looks to cut into Trump's edge
item.description: Democratic vice presidential nominee Tim Walz will unveil his ticket’s plans to improve the lives of rural voters as Vice President Kamala Harris looks to cut into former President Donald Trump’s support.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: BATTLEGROUND SERIES: Arizona's 11 electoral votes hinge on key swing county Biden won by a hair in 2020
item.description: Maricopa County, Arizona will play a critical role in determining not only wins Arizona's electoral votes but who wins the White House, locals told Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's Pennsylvania town hall turns into impromptu concert after medical incidents
item.description: OAKS, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump 's town hall in the Philadelphia suburbs turned into an impromptu concert Monday after the former president was twice interrupted by medical emergencies in the room.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump edges out Harris with early voters in battleground states
item.description: Former President Trump has a slight edge over Vice President Harris with early voters in battleground states, new polling shows, a promising sign for the Republican in the highly competitive presidential race.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Rep. Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, challenger Joe Kent face off in Washington 3rd District debate
item.description: One of the races that could determine the fate of Congress this election season happens to be the rematch race for Washington's 3rd District, and on Monday night, the candidates will debate on KOIN 6.
item.dc:creator: Michaela Bourgeois, NewsNation

item.title: Harris announces a new plan to empower Black men as she tries to energize them to vote for her
item.description: ERIE, Pa. (AP) — Vice President Kamala Harris announced a plan on Monday to give Black men more economic opportunities and other chances to thrive as she works to energize a key voting bloc that has Democrats concerned about a lack of enthusiasm.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Latest: Trump and Harris make appearances in Pennsylvania, the largest battleground state
item.description: Democrat Kamala Harris and Republican Donald Trump took their presidential campaigns back to Pennsylvania on Monday. About 7 million votes are up for grabs in the election's largest battleground state, where mail-in voting is well underway.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: User’s manual on what House races to watch on Election Night
item.description: Election night in 2024 will not only determine who stands in the White House, but also may change the fate of who controls the House of Representatives.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One-on-one with Mississippi's candidates in 2024 US Senate race
item.description: JACKSON, Miss. (WJTV) - U.S. Senator Roger Wicker (R-Miss.) and his Democratic opponent, Ty Pinkins, spoke to WJTV 12 News ahead of the November General Election. Wicker, a Pontotoc native, has been serving Mississippi in the U.S. Senate since 2007.
item.dc:creator: Tom Wright, NewsNation

item.title: NJ lawmakers' fight against teen vaping continues with new bill
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) -- The fight against youth vaping continues in the Garden State as some Trenton lawmakers are trying to pass a law prohibiting the delivery of electronic smoking devices to people under 21, requiring someone over 21 to sign off on the delivery.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Cruz calls out McConnell-aligned group for not spending 'a penny' in Texas
item.description: Texas Sen. Ted Cruz (R) vented his frustration with the Senate Leadership Fund, a super PAC aligned with Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johnson announces $27.5M third-quarter fundraising in record for Speaker
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) announced a $27.5 million fundraising haul for the third quarter of the year, a sum that is welcome news for Republicans hoping to keep control of the House as they enter the final stretch of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tim Scott mulls run to lead Senate Republicans' campaign arm
item.description: Sen. Tim Scott (R-S.C.) is seriously considering making a run to become chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) in 2026, sources told The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Democrat Hakeem Jeffries stumps in California in a bid to reclaim House control
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries crisscrossed Southern California over the weekend in communities far from the presidential battlegrounds — Little Saigon in Orange County and the high desert of Antelope Valley — as he works to wrest control of the U.S. House from Republicans.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eric Adams is 'working well through the chaos': Gov. Hochul
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Gov. Kathy Hochul offered support for embattled New York City Mayor Eric Adams during the Columbus Day Parade in Manhattan on Monday. "Told him to bring in new blood… he's doing that… working well through the chaos," she told PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Mayorkas: Hurricane misinformation 'is extremely pernicious'
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas on Sunday described the flurry of misinformation online about the hurricanes devastating parts of the U.S. as "extremely pernicious," warning that it’s hindering efforts to assist those affected by the storms.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Scully, NewsNation

item.title: Walz defends using the term 'socialism': 'It's what the right uses'
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) on Sunday defended his use of the word "socialism" over the summer, saying he believes "capitalism works" but that there are things society must do collectively.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Scully, NewsNation

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Tallahassee sends city crews to aid Tampa Bay recovery efforts
item.description: As communities wait for daylight to come Thursday morning to see the damage that has been done and for emergency personnel to start rescue efforts, counties in north Florida are sending their crews to the Tampa Bay area to aid in recovery.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon could resign: sources
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Less than a month after the NYPD's interim commissioner was appointed, another major shake-up could be coming. Interim NYPD Commissioner Tom Donlon is expected to step down, sources said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Biden postpones trip to Germany and Angola to monitor Hurricane Milton
item.description: President Joe Biden said Tuesday he is postponing a planned trip to Germany and Angola to stay at the White House to monitor Hurricane Milton, as it spins closer to Florida’s Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Election drop boxes open in San Diego County
item.description: While mail ballots are expected to arrive this week for registered voters, 150 official ballot drop boxes opened Tuesday in San Diego County for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Meet the candidates running for Congress in San Diego County
item.description: As Election Day nears, voters in San Diego County will soon get to choose who will represent San Diego County in the U.S. House of Representatives.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Lombardo among GOP governors criticizing Biden-Harris immigration asylum actions
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo was among 25 Republican governors who signed a letter criticizing the Biden-Harris administration over asylum policies that have brought more than a half-million immigrants into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News
